description: Style Note Let only transform your everyday attire to fun, colourful and stylish! We're super excited in the myntra office to be selling these flattering tops and dresses from the quirky, flirty, denim brand ONLY. It's easy to look both cute and trendy when you're wearing anything from this summery collection. Product Details Multi-coloured racer back top with horizontal stripes, has a round neckline and gathers on the back yoke Material and Care 100% viscose Machine wash warm with like colours Do not bleach or tumble dry Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
